description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a clean, minimalist design, featuring white exterior walls and large rectangular windows. The structure is composed of two main volumes, one slightly elevated above the other, creating a dynamic L-shaped footprint. The front area includes a covered carport with a parked vehicle and a small landscaped garden with grass and shrubs. The building sits on a rectangular plot with visible site markings and dimensions, suggesting a planned urban lot. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some narrow vertical panes and larger horizontal ones, providing ample natural light. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open space.
description: A modern, white, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a covered carport, and a landscaped front garden on a rectangular urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered carport with a vehicle, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and the stepped elevation of the building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large horizontal windows and the building's L-shaped layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall with minimal window openings and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
